title: [TACZ] Endless Ammo
description: A library for ammunitions in TaCZ
body:
WE ARE SO BACK

(We are back developing the mod and contacting even more content creators!)

## REMEMBER TO USE IT WITH TACZ

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3828781112b223c470c8045c269e8c7beaf9bc6c_0.webp)
### Welcome to Endless Ammo! A gunpack/library made for content creators and users of tacz!

This gunpack aims to fix issues of overwriting like this with making all the ammunitions be compatible with all the gunpacks

![5.45](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7afbdf7f064bdee34df921da4ee86ac4dbeb20f.png)
![9x39mm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae985a039e0f4e90440853259c9b86559add0446.png)
![300 black](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/088828bf8cae29967d64a63245b9762a719b1ed4.png)
 
We made this "gunpack" to make content creators don't have to make ammo so this issues don't happen, this gunpack is made as a .jar file so people can put it as a dependency in modrinth!
We recommend and gladly appreciate if your gunpack is affected by overwrite to move into this library for better compatibility, you can contribute ammo types yourself anyway, if it's suggesting it for us to add it, every ammunition type you suggest for us to add we will add it as fast as we can

this is the current ammunitions that are in game
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a55623d3f800cb4c8859c4fbe7f1ec9758ad5f49.png)

Gun packs that work with EA
(plz check them, they are great)

[TACZ] MaxSlop

[TACZ] Maple Gunpack


[TaCZ] Expanded Arsenal


[TACZ] Disassembly Pack


[TACZ] Nameless's Low Poly Guns


If you are a content creator reading this and you want to move into our project you can contact us in discord or qq!
Owner's accounts to contact:

Discord Server - https://discord.gg/33uGFBdexD
Discord - @barquitotoxico
QQ - 3762653806

Permissions
You are allowed to:
-Include this mod in public and private modpacks.
-Use this mod as a dependency or library for addons and gunpacks.
-Use and play the mod freely.
You are NOT allowed to:
-Re-upload or redistribute this mod anywhere without permission.
-Upload modified or ported versions without permission.
-Monetize or sell downloads of this mod.
Official downloads are only provided through this CurseForge page and/or the official modrinth (With exceptions for 1.21.1 fabric with Endless Ammo Refabricated)
